arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle facing difficulties as Liverpool swoop in for €60m-rated 21-year-old with 9 G/A in 21 games
arts.sum: Newcastle will be looking to strengthen their squad this winter but are facing difficulties in trying to land PSV’s brilliant right winger, Johan Bakayoko.
